title: SwapIntent
description: What a taker wants to swap (SPEC §4.1). `minReceive` is authoritative; `maxSlippageBps` is an additional guard that MUST NOT relax `minReceive`.

give.description: The asset and total amount the taker offers.

want.description: The asset the taker wants and the floor it will accept.

minReceive.description: Authoritative floor: a settlement delivering less than this MUST fail (SPEC §4.1, §6). MUST be strictly greater than 0 (RFC-0001 Decision B); enforced by the validator since JSON Schema cannot express it on a decimal string.

maxSlippageBps.description: Additional slippage protection relative to an agreed reference, in basis points (SPEC §4.1). MUST be >= 0 and MUST NOT relax minReceive.

deadline.description: Absolute expiry; settlement MUST NOT occur after this (SPEC §4.1, §6).
